title: 3D Any Chest! (Optifine)
description: Make any chest from a texture pack 3D
body: As long as you have [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) (or a cem loader mod) and a chest texture (or none, Minecraft already has one!) this will work! Works with ANY texture pack as long as said texture pack doesn't have it's own custom 3D/animated chest! should be able to work with any sized texture pack The bottom of the chest is only black when using the default Minecraft texture or your texture uses that color, not a glitch!
